chunks.text: Order sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett.D-113 of 2023 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 29.09.2025 Mr. Ghulam Shabbeer Shar, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General Sindh ************** Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, same is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
